# People's Patterns

> Made-to-measure sewing patterns, generated in the browser from your body measurements.

People's Patterns is a web application at https://peoplespatterns.com that generates custom-fit sewing patterns using parametric drafting - the same math taught in fashion design schools, but using your exact body measurements instead of standard sizes.

## How it works

1. Enter your body measurements (bust, waist, hip, rise, inseam, shoulder, sleeve)
2. Choose a garment from the catalog (83 patterns across shorts, pants, shirts, dresses, skirts, jackets, accessories)
3. Customize fit and style options (slim/regular/relaxed, pocket style, closure type, length)
4. The engine drafts a pattern to your exact dimensions
5. Download a print-ready tiled PDF for home printing or copy shop

## Pricing

- Simple tier: $9 (beginner-friendly - elastic waists, minimal shaping)
- Core tier: $14 (wardrobe staples - standard closures, moderate shaping)
- Tailored tier: $19 (detailed construction - pleats, darts, linings)
- Bundles: 3-pattern capsule $29, 5-pattern wardrobe $49
- Memberships: Club $12/mo (1 credit), Wardrobe $24/mo (3 credits)
- First pattern is free with a free account. No credit card required.

## Key differentiators

- No size charts. Every pattern is drafted to your exact measurements.
- No alterations needed. The pattern accounts for your body, not a statistical average.
- Instant delivery. Patterns generate in seconds, not days.
- Unlimited re-downloads. Update measurements and re-generate at no extra charge.
- 83 garment patterns covering menswear, womenswear, and unisex.

## Contact

- Website: https://peoplespatterns.com

- Instagram: @peoplespatterns
- YouTube: @peoplespatterns
